title: tanacetum vulgare f. crispum
intro: Tanacetum vulgare f. crispum, also known as crisp-leaved tansy or tansy 'Fern-Leaf', is a variety of the tansy plant, a perennial herb belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Tanacetum vulgare f. crispum include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The plant has been used for its health benefits, including relieving digestive problems, reducing anxiety and stress, and exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Tansy 'Fern-Leaf' can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although caution is advised due to its potential toxicity and interactions with certain medications.
